transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang,
It's crab season right now and I was told that they are full of eggs in May
And these are all full of eggs So I prepared steamed blue crabs
Anyways, Bon appetit
I have 5 soy sauce marinated shrimps here
They gave me this on the house I'll eat it in a bit
Eggs Can you see it?
I just got a spoonful
So savory Delicious
This part needs to be eaten
Right here on the sides
It's not fishy at all
Eggs with intestines
I can eat 100 of these
It's the best

It's filled with eggs
Squeeze out the meat like this
Any way is delicious
Really The meat is so sweet
Blue crabs taste better than the king crabs
It's the best kind of crab
It's just hard to eat
I'll show you how to eat them
I'll eat the claws together later
Cut the top out like this
Then this part comes out
Break it and eat the meat
You can just suck on it
Then all the meat comes out
For this one
Get the joint and break it

Why won't you break
There's the meat
Now take out the back shell
This is all meat
Now for the spicy seasoned
Let's squeeze out the meat
It won't come out
I'll just eat it
It'll just take too long if I try to do it properly
So good
It's a little spicy But it doesn't have that stuffy taste
It just has a kick to it
Where's the one I was working on?
All that meat
The spicy seasoned one is really tasty
These got cold sitting here

But it'll be so delicious when it's fresh and warm
Marinated shrimp I've been wanting to eat it
It's not salty
Crazy
Look over here Eggs
It's just everywhere
All this in 1 bite
Eggs That's a lot, right?
1 spoonful
So tasty
Everything is good
Should I tie my hair? I need to be fully prepared to eat
Let's just eat it like this
It will just take too long to pick out the meat 1 by 1
They're full of eggs
Do people eat rice with this?

You can already see the eggs
That was all meat
You can get a lot of meat if you cut it in half like this
This won't fit in 1 spoonful
I'm digesting everything as I'm eating
There's sauce in here
So many
So sweet
This one must be delicious
You need to be thorough in eating this part
You see that?
I scraped all of that out from the sides
(Talking about a donation reaction)
I've been collecting the claws over here It's my favorite part
I'll collect the legs from now
It's spicy

Spicy, but tasty
It won't be as spicy if you don't eat this much
I'm eating but it's not filling me up
Yum
I'll pick out the meat for this
Full of eggs
Both are delicious
The seasoned one tastes better Because I steamed the other one..
3 of these and 4 of these left
I'm exhausted
But all this labor is worth it
It's tasty
Really The happiness and the adrenaline you get from eating this
Hey!
Why're you doing that?
Oh no!

This was given to me by a fan
He thinks that's a cat tower
A struggle with the crabs
So many eggs
That bite was just pure happiness
I don't really eat fried rice, or even put rice in my ramyun soup
But this right here is a must
Well today..
I'm really tired from cracking all the crab shells
I've been doing it for like 3.5~4 hours
It'll take even longer to finish all of this
So I'll be ending the mukbang here I'll eat the rest later
For dinner or tomorrow's breakfast
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
